Event: Clans Game
Event Date: 30/06/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AR424
Grim Tracker Gear

For the duration of the battle, the fighter's crit is increased by 35%.

For the duration of the battle, each critical hit increases the physical and magic armor of the unit and all allied units by 60% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 4 times.

When the unit's health drops below 35%, incoming damage against the unit is reduced by 55%. All of the attacks by the armor's wearer also become critical.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌚🌚🌚
